violations.description: File upload zone only supports drag-and-drop interaction with no keyboard-accessible alternative (e.g., file input button). Keyboard and screen reader users cannot upload files.
violations.reference_fix:
📤

Drag and drop files here to upload

violations.description: Context menu is triggered by right-click (oncontextmenu) with no keyboard alternative. The menu items are <div> elements, not <button> or <menuitem>. The menu has no role='menu' and items have no role='menuitem'.
File types are communicated only through emoji icons (📁, 📄, 🖼️, 📊, 📝). Screen readers may not announce these reliably, providing no file type information to assistive technology users.
violations.reference_fix:
📄
homepage-v3.fig
Figma file, 4.2 MB · Mar 28

violations.description: The selected file item uses a CSS class 'selected' for visual styling but has no aria-selected attribute. Screen readers cannot determine which files are selected.
Breadcrumb trail is a plain <div> without <nav> element and aria-label='Breadcrumb'. Screen readers cannot identify it as a navigation landmark.
violations.reference_fix:
1. My Files
  2. Projects
  3. Website Redesign

violations.description: View toggle controls (grid/list) are <div> elements, not <button>. They are not keyboard-focusable and the active state is not conveyed to assistive technology.
violations.reference_fix:
<button class="view-btn active" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Grid view">⊞</button>
<button class="view-btn" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="List view">☰</button>

page_description: A cloud file manager with sidebar navigation, breadcrumbs, file grid with selection, drag-and-drop upload zone, context menu, and view toggles. Issues include drag-drop-only upload, inaccessible context menu, icon-only file types, unannounced selection state, non-semantic breadcrumbs, and div-based view toggles.
